implant.name: Coronary Stent for PDA stenting - Bare Metal

stg_missing_criteria: Minimum doctor qualification for the treating physician is not explicitly stated in the clinical presentation
validated.stg_reasoning: The patient satisfies the 'History of coronary artery disease (CAD)/ multiple risk factors for MI' indication, as coronary angiography confirms 80% stenosis in the proximal LAD, establishing CAD, and the patient has a history of hypertension. The mandatory clinical threshold of 'stenosis >= 70% in one or more of the main coronary artery' is also unambiguously met, with the angiography report detailing 80% stenosis in the proximal LAD. All clinical criteria for the procedure are satisfied. While the specific qualification of the performing doctor is not explicitly stated, the patient was referred by a cardiologist, suggesting appropriate medical oversight.
